name: pasta
title: Pasta
description: Interacts with the remote Pasta store.
author: nothuman

preferences.name: pastaCliPath
preferences.title: Pasta CLI Path
preferences.description: Optional path to the pasta binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH and common install locations.

commands.name: copy
commands.title: Copy
commands.description: Copies the selected text to the Pasta remote store.
commands.subtitle: Copy to Pasta store

commands.name: paste
commands.title: Paste
commands.description: Pastes last entry from the pasta store.
commands.subtitle: Paste from Pasta store

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

This workspace is managed with Bun and is intended for Raycast Store publishing.
Run \`bun run publish\` from extensions/raycast instead.

" && exit 1
